reason: Backend spec entry point + pre-development checklist + Quality Check section.

Authoritative contract for eval module extension. §2 reserves expected_skill_pack_name; §3.1 requires staying inside existing eval module; §3.4 mandates reuse of deterministic assertion machinery; §3.5 permits additive setup root span / EvalRun metadata; §3.6 reserves cases/setup/skill_pack/<stage>/ path. Stage 1 must honor all of these.

§3.7a defines the trace propagation single-source contract for skill_pack_name. Stage 1's new field expected_skill_pack_name must consume runtime_result.structured_payload['skill_pack_name'] via the same trace surface, not via prompt content or request fields.
Reuse-first thinking: extend existing deterministic grader path instead of inventing new scoring classes. Stage 1 adds fields, not pipelines.
Eval consumes runtime + trace data across layers. Stage 1 new fields read from runtime_result / trace attributes; must not invent parallel data sources.
